description_long: This object consists of three cardboard storage boxes stacked on a light-colored wooden pallet. The boxes are cubic, with printed labels and handling symbols on their sides, suggesting they are used for shipping or storage. The pallet is constructed from unfinished wood planks, with two large rectangular slots on the front for forklift access. The boxes are arranged in a staggered formation, with one box on top and two below, maximizing stability. The cardboard boxes have a matte finish and are likely empty or filled with lightweight goods, as the pallet is not fully loaded. The overall appearance is typical of items found in warehouses, shipping docks, or urban storage areas.
description: Three labeled cardboard boxes are stacked on a light wooden pallet, arranged for storage or transport. The boxes feature printed handling symbols and the pallet has forklift slots.
description_view_0: Front view showing three cardboard boxes on a wooden pallet, with two large forklift slots visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the staggered arrangement of the boxes and the open slats of the pallet.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with clear visibility of the box labels and pallet structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the single top box and the two lower boxes, with pallet slats visible.
